title: oreodaphne mexicana var. subsessilis
intro: Oreodaphne mexicana var. subsessilis, also known as Mexican Oreodaphne or subsessile variety, is a plant species belonging to the Lauraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and bark have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, colds, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Oreodaphne mexicana var. subsessilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
